suggestions.description: Consider using threading.RLock() instead of threading.Lock() to support safe inheritance and potential future re-entrant call patterns. A regular Lock will deadlock if a subclass wraps parent methods with additional locking.
Add __repr__ method for debugging. Use self.get_balance() (not self._balance directly) to maintain thread-safety in the representation.
Consider adding a close()/is_active pattern to prevent operations on closed accounts, which is a common real-world requirement.
